entries.source: "Build a photosynthesis explanation with me"
entries.value: "Maak saam met my 'n verduideliking oor fotosintese"

entries.source: "Help me plan an essay"
entries.value: "Help my 'n opstel te plannen"

entries.source: "Let's learn fractions together"
entries.value: "Laten ons saam breuken leer"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Collaborative Instruction on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: 'n praktiese gids vir die gebruik van Collaborative Instruction op inspir vir basisleer, met prompts, studielusse en veiliger AI-gewoontes.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: 'n sterker studielus

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: Pas die sessie aan jou doel aan.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI-tutor

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Vra om 'n klein eerste stap in plaas van 'n definitief antwoord.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Vra die AI om jy redenasie te kontroleer, nie net wat resultaat.

entries.source: Build, critique, and learn in a shared workroom.
entries.value: Bou, bekritiseer en leer in 'n gedeelde werkruimte.

entries.source: Collaborative Instruction
entries.value: Samewerkende Onderrig

entries.source: Collaborative Instruction AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Collaborative Instruction AI Learning Mode is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik vir leer in plaas van passiewe antwoordversameling. Die modus draai om 'n spesifieke taak: oopmaak 'n gedeelde werkruimte met 'n AI-werknemer. Maak 'n ruwe artefact, wissel bewerkingen uit, daag swak plekken uit, verduidelik besluiten vast en vertrek met konkrete vooruitgaanng.

entries.source: Collaborative Instruction AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Collaborative Instruction AI Learning Mode: praktiese gids

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Sluit af deur die idee uit wat geheugen terug te skryf.

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: Grondslae

entries.source: Learners exploring foundations topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Leerders wat grondslae-onderwerpe verken en praktiese leiding wil hê in plaas van 'n generiese antwoordblokkie.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompts om te probeer

entries.source: Start the live mode at Collaborative Instruction. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Interactive Instruction. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Begin die lewendig modus by Collaborative Instruction. Wil jy 'n verwante leervorm, probeer dan Interactive Instruction. Vir 'n breer beeld van die platform lees jy wat 'n AI-leermaat vir almal sou moet doen.

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Begin met voorbeeldprompts.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Vertel die modus wat jy probeert te leer of te maak.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Dat verschil zie jy in die flow. In plek van een enorme reaksie bewegen die beste sessies deur 'n lus: stel 'n doel, probeer iets, krijg terugvoer, herstel die swak plek en kies die volgende aksie.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Die focus is belangrik. 'n algemene chatbot kan byna alles beantwoorde, maar 'n leermodus geeft wat gesprek vorm. Die stuurt jy na wat soort dink, oefen, terugvoer of verkennen waardoor die idee bly hangen.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Hierdie is dieselfde gewoonte agter studeren met AI sonder jezelf te besluitdriegen: hou die leerder aktief. AI is wat nuttigst wanneer wat terugvoer geeft op jy dink.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Hierdie modus is vooral nuttig vir leerders wat wil:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for collaborative instruction with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Hierdie modus is ingestel vir samewerkende onderrig met sy eie aansporings, voorbeelde en leervloei.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Probeer die stap in jy eie woorde.

entries.source: Use Collaborative Instruction when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gebruik Collaborative Instruction wanneer jy 'n sessie wil wat vinnig begin maar homself toch aan jou aanpas. Die eerste doel is nie om indrukwekkend te kskakel. Die eerste doel is om die volgende stap haalbaar te laat voel.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Waar hierdie modus by help

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Waar jy hierna natoe kan

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Jy kan ook begin met 'n ruwe versie van jou regte probleem. 'n rommelige eerste prompt is prima. Die sessie kan wat vlak, die teikengroep, sperdatum en styl verduideliken zodra jy begint.
